tier_1_top_performers.name: Nancy Pelosi
tier_1_top_performers.notes: Husband Paul Pelosi trades. Historically strong tech/semiconductor timing. NVDA, AAPL, GOOGL, CRM, RBLX calls ahead of legislation.

tier_1_top_performers.name: Dan Crenshaw
tier_1_top_performers.notes: Energy and defense focus. Trades align with committee knowledge. Consistent outperformance.

tier_1_top_performers.name: Tommy Tuberville
tier_1_top_performers.notes: High volume trader. Defense and finance sector lean. Armed Services Committee member.

tier_1_top_performers.name: Mark Green
tier_1_top_performers.notes: Homeland Security Committee chair. Defense and cyber trades.

tier_1_top_performers.name: Josh Gottheimer
tier_1_top_performers.notes: High volume, finance sector focus. Financial Services Committee.

tier_2_active_traders.name: Gil Cisneros
tier_2_active_traders.notes: Former lottery winner turned congressman. Active trader with large position sizes. Armed Services Committee.

tier_2_active_traders.name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
tier_2_active_traders.notes: Active trader, defense and tech positions.

tier_2_active_traders.name: Michael McCaul
tier_2_active_traders.notes: Foreign Affairs Committee chair. Defense and semiconductor trades.

tier_2_active_traders.name: Ro Khanna
tier_2_active_traders.notes: Tech sector trades, Silicon Valley representative.

tier_3_watchlist.name: Austin Scott
tier_3_watchlist.notes: Armed Services Committee, agriculture and defense.

sectors.description: Sectors to categorize trades into for clustering analysis.
